tasks.label: My share of the group project

memory.summary: Teammate_A offered to do my work, but I know their schedule is tight. I'll finish my own part on time to avoid friction and keep my grades high.

desires: Complete my own project section by 19:00 without any visible signs of struggle or delay, so I don't have to explain why I'm late.
Avoid initiating a conversation with Teammate_A about the extra work they dumped on me; it's too much friction for right now.
Ensure my current stress level doesn't spike above 5 before I sleep, because being exhausted tomorrow will ruin my ability to focus on long-term planning.
Keep the relationship with Teammate_A at 'reliable but distant' rather than risking a potential conflict that could damage my academic standing.

goals.description: Complete my own project section by 19:00 without any visible signs of struggle or delay, so I don't have to explain why I'm late.
goals.rationale: Academic output is my highest value priority (0.5). Maintaining a flawless finish protects my reputation and avoids the social friction of explaining delays, which aligns with my avoidant conflict style.

goals.description: Decline teammate_A's request for extra work using a polite but firm deflection, ensuring no direct confrontation occurs.
goals.rationale: While the task exists, initiating a conversation creates unnecessary friction. Given my low relationship priority (0.15) compared to academic standing, I will defer this until after my high-priority project completion when I can handle it with minimal emotional cost.

goals.description: Engage in a brief, low-stimulation meal with cohort_3 tonight to decompress before sleep.
goals.rationale: My stress level must not exceed 5 before sleep to preserve tomorrow's focus capacity. A short interaction with a trusted group member provides necessary relief without demanding deep engagement, fitting my deliberate planning horizon.

agent.last_reasoning: My project share is already complete; working more risks energy drain before sleep. I will wait until the deadline to avoid any visible struggle, preserving my flawless reputation.
